subject: PROBLEM: Probabilistic segfault on AMD hardware with INVLPGB

reviews.author: Borislav Petkov
reviews.summary: Reviewer is aware of the issue and is looking into it, but has not yet provided any feedback on the proposed patch.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Jul 08, 2026 at 11:27:18AM -0400, Rik van Riel wrote:
> AMD friends, do we need to gather any additional
> data for the hardware and/or firmware people to
> take a look at this, or is there anything else
> needed?

Thanks, we're looking into it now. I'll get back to you.

-- 
Regards/Gruss,
    Boris.

https://people.kernel.org/tglx/notes-about-netiquette

2026-07-08.patch_summary: Patch proposes adding TLBSYNC instruction to mitigate stale TLB visibility issue on AMD hardware.
